subject: Zygarde (50% Forme) — a segmented serpentine creature with a glowing green core cell at its center, red and dark body segments, dynamic pose against a dark energy-charged background
description: A segmented, serpentine creature dominates the frame in a forceful action pose. Its body is composed of dark and red armored segments with a prominent glowing green sphere visible at the chest/core. Green and teal energy crackles radiate outward from the figure against a deep dark background. The overall form matches Zygarde's 50% Forme — a large, powerful creature with distinct cellular body construction. The composition is dynamic, with the figure lunging toward the viewer.
foreground: Segmented dark-and-red armored creature with glowing green core, energy crackles
background: Dark void with green and teal energy aura radiating outward
